<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Carte Fidélité – Pheno&Co</title>
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#070707"/>
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"/>
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black"/>
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Fidélité"/>
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/qrcodejs/1.0.0/qrcode.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    :root{--gold:#d7a14b;--gold-soft:#f1c57a;--text:#f7f2ea;--muted:#d7d0c7;}
    html,body{background:#070707!important;margin:0;padding:0;}
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif;background:#070707;color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
    .card{width:min(100%,460px);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(18,18,18,.96),rgba(8,8,8,.98));border:1.5px solid rgba(215,161,75,.85);border-radius:28px;padding:24px 20px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.55);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
    .glow{position:absolute;inset:auto 10% 0 10%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold-soft),transparent);box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(241,197,122,.85);}
    .glow.top{top:0;bottom:auto;}
    .screen{display:none;}.screen.active{display:block;}
    .fidelite-title{text-align:center;color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:1px;margin:10px 0 6px;}
    .divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(215,161,75,.6),transparent);margin:8px 0 16px;}
    .form-group{margin-bottom:14px;}
    .form-group label{display:block;color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .form-group input{width:100%;background:#111;border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.4);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;color:#f7f2ea;font-size:1rem;}
    .form-group input::placeholder{color:#555;}
    .form-group input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold);}
    .btn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;width:100%;color:#fff8ef;text-decoration:none;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(215,161,75,.18),rgba(215,161,75,.08));border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.6);border-radius:16px;padding:14px;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;margin-top:10px;font-family:inherit;}
    .btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(215,161,75,.35),rgba(215,161,75,.15));border-color:var(--gold);}
    .btn-wa{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(37,211,102,.2),rgba(37,211,102,.08));border-color:#25d366;color:#25d366;}
    .btn-sm{padding:10px 14px;font-size:.88rem;margin-top:6px;}
    .tampons{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
    .tampon-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;}
    .tampon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(215,161,75,.3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
    .tampon.filled{border-color:var(--gold);background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(215,161,75,.2),rgba(215,161,75,.05));box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(215,161,75,.25);}
    .tampon-date{font-size:.55rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;max-width:48px;}
    .progress-big{text-align:center;color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:800;font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .client-box{background:rgba(215,161,75,.06);border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.2);border-radius:16px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
    .client-name{font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold-soft);}
    .client-detail{color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem;margin-top:3px;}
    .offert-box{text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(215,161,75,.15),rgba(215,161,75,.05));border:1.5px solid rgba(215,161,75,.7);border-radius:20px;padding:20px;margin:12px 0;}
    .offert-box .big{font-size:2.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .offert-box h3{color:var(--gold-soft);font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .offert-box p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem;}
    .alerte-box{text-align:center;background:rgba(255,50,50,.1);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,50,50,.4);border-radius:16px;padding:14px;margin:10px 0;}
    .alerte-box p{color:#ff6b6b;font-weight:700;}
    .qr-box{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:14px;margin-top:14px;text-align:center;}
    .qr-box p{color:#333;font-size:.78rem;margin-top:8px;font-weight:600;}
    .install-box{background:rgba(215,161,75,.06);border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.18);border-radius:14px;padding:12px;margin-top:12px;text-align:center;}
    .install-box .titre{color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .install-box p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.7;}
    .msg-err{background:rgba(255,50,50,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,50,50,.3);color:#ff6b6b;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;text-align:center;font-weight:700;margin-top:8px;display:none;font-size:.9rem;}
    .spin{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:12px;font-size:.9rem;display:none;}
    .info-text{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.5;margin:12px 0;}
    .search-input{width:100%;background:#111;border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.4);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;color:#f7f2ea;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:10px;}
    .search-input::placeholder{color:#555;}
    .search-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold);}
    .client-row{background:rgba(215,161,75,.05);border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.15);border-radius:14px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
    .client-row .nom{color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:700;}
    .client-row .sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:.8rem;margin-top:2px;}
    .badge{background:rgba(215,161,75,.2);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:20px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-soft);white-space:nowrap;}
    .badge-ok{background:rgba(0,200,100,.15);border-color:#4ade80;color:#4ade80;}
    .badge-exp{background:rgba(255,50,50,.15);border-color:#ff6b6b;color:#ff6b6b;}
    .stats-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .stat-box{flex:1;background:rgba(215,161,75,.06);border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.2);border-radius:12px;padding:8px;text-align:center;}
    .stat-num{color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:800;font-size:1.3rem;}
    .stat-label{color:var(--muted);font-size:.72rem;margin-top:1px;}
    .num{color:var(--muted);font-size:.72rem;margin-right:5px;}
    .pin-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.94);z-index:200;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
    .pin-overlay.open{display:flex;}
    .pin-box{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#161616,#0a0a0a);border:1.5px solid rgba(215,161,75,.8);border-radius:24px;padding:28px 22px;width:min(100%,340px);text-align:center;}
    .pin-box h3{color:var(--gold-soft);margin-bottom:6px;}
    .pin-box p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .pin-input{width:100%;background:#111;border:1px solid rgba(215,161,75,.4);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;color:#f7f2ea;font-size:1.6rem;text-align:center;letter-spacing:10px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .pin-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold);}
    .pin-err{color:#ff6b6b;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:8px;display:none;}
    .btn-inline{background:rgba(215,161,75,.22);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:10px;padding:6px 11px;color:#fff8ef;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap;}
    .btn-inline-red{background:rgba(255,50,50,.08);border:1px solid #ff6b6b;border-radius:10px;padding:6px 10px;color:#ff6b6b;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;}
    .btn-inline-green{background:rgba(0,200,100,.1);border:1px solid #4ade80;border-radius:10px;padding:6px 10px;color:#4ade80;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;}
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="card">
  <div class="glow top"></div>
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:6px">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Pheno&Co" style="width:82%;max-width:280px;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto"/>
  </div>
  <div class="fidelite-title" id="admin-tap" onclick="tapAdmin()" style="cursor:default;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent">✂️ CARTE FIDÉLITÉ</div>
  <div class="divider"></div>

  <div class="screen active" id="s-accueil">
    <p class="info-text">6 visites = ta <strong style="color:var(--gold-soft)">7ème coupe offerte !</strong><br><span style="font-size:.78rem">Valable 30 jours après le 6ème tampon</span></p>
    <div class="tampons">
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon filled">✂️</div></div>
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon filled">✂️</div></div>
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon filled">✂️</div></div>
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon">✂️</div></div>
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon">✂️</div></div>
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon">✂️</div></div>
      <div class="tampon-wrap"><div class="tampon">🎁</div></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="go('s-inscription')">🎉 Créer ma carte</button>
    <button class="btn" onclick="go('s-recherche')" style="margin-top:8px">🔍 J'ai déjà une carte</button>
  </div>

  <div class="screen" id="s-inscription">
    <h3 style="color:var(--gold-soft);text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px">Créer ma carte</h3>
    <div class="form-group"><label>Prénom *</label><input id="i-prenom" type="text" placeholder="Ton prénom"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label>Téléphone *</label><input id="i-tel" type="tel" placeholder="06 XX XX XX XX"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label>Email (optionnel)</label><input id="i-email" type="email" placeholder="ton@email.com"/></div>
    <div class="msg-err" id="err-ins"></div>
    <div class="spin" id="load-ins">Création en cours...</div>
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="creerCarte()">✅ Créer ma carte</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="go('s-accueil')" style="margin-top:8px">← Retour</button>
  </div>

  <div class="screen" id="s-carte">
    <div class="client-box">
      <div class="client-name" id="c-nom"></div>
      <div class="client-detail" id="c-tel"></div>
      <div class="client-detail" id="c-created"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="progress-big" id="c-progress"></div>
    <div class="tampons" id="c-tampons"></div>
    <div class="alerte-box" id="c-alerte" style="display:none"><p>⏰ Offre expirée — 30 jours dépassés</p></div>
    <div class="offert-box" id="c-offert" style="display:none">
      <span class="big">🎉</span>
      <h3>Félicitations !</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">Votre prochaine coupe est offerte !</p>
      <p id="c-offert-txt"></p>
    </div>
    <a class="btn btn-wa" id="btn-wa" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="display:none">📲 Envoyer ma demande au barbier</a>
    <div class="qr-box" id="qr-box" style="display:none">
      <div id="qr-canvas"></div>
      <p>Mon QR code — montre-le au salon ✂️</p>
    </div>
    <div class="install-box">
      <div class="titre">📲 Installe ta carte sur ton téléphone</div>
      <p><strong style="color:var(--text)">iPhone :</strong> ⬆️ → "Sur l'écran d'accueil"<br><strong style="color:var(--text)">Android :</strong> ⋮ → "Ajouter à l'écran d'accueil"</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="go('s-accueil')" style="margin-top:10px">← Retour</button>
  </div>

  <div class="screen" id="s-recherche">
    <h3 style="color:var(--gold-soft);text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px">Retrouver ma carte</h3>
    <div class="form-group"><label>Ton téléphone</label><input id="i-rech" type="tel" placeholder="06 XX XX XX XX"/></div>
    <div class="msg-err" id="err-rech"></div>
    <div class="spin" id="load-rech">Recherche...</div>
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="rechercherCarte()">🔍 Trouver ma carte</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="go('s-accueil')" style="margin-top:8px">← Retour</button>
  </div>

  <div class="screen" id="s-admin">
    <h3 style="color:var(--gold-soft);text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px">⚙️ ESPACE GÉRANT</h3>
    <div class="stats-row" id="stats-row"></div>
    <input class="search-input" id="search-client" type="text" placeholder="🔍 Rechercher un client..." oninput="filtrerClients(this.value)" style="display:none"/>
    <div class="spin" id="load-liste">Chargement...</div>
    <div id="liste-clients"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="rechargerAdmin()" style="margin-top:10px">↩️ Retour admin</button>
  </div>

  <div class="glow"></div>
</div>

<div class="pin-overlay" id="pin-ov">
  <div class="pin-box">
    <h3>⚙️ Accès Gérant</h3>
    <p>Entre ton code PIN</p>
    <input class="pin-input" id="pin-inp" type="password" maxlength="4" placeholder="••••" inputmode="numeric"/>
    <div class="pin-err" id="pin-err">Code incorrect !</div>
    <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="valPin()">✅ Entrer</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="ferPin()" style="margin-top:8px">Annuler</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-app.js";
import { getFirestore, doc, setDoc, getDoc, updateDoc, deleteDoc, getDocs, collection } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.7.1/firebase-firestore.js";

const db = getFirestore(initializeApp({
  apiKey: "AIzaSyAszW6i7b8tAdRVKmsgzlMicYg6Q4Hi31E",
  authDomain: "carte-de-fidel.firebaseapp.com",
  projectId: "carte-de-fidel",
  storageBucket: "carte-de-fidel.firebasestorage.app",
  messagingSenderId: "475585058425",
  appId: "1:475585058425:web:f776930462473052e6a6a8"
}));

const PIN = "1141", MAX = 6, DELAI = 30;
const GERANT_WA = "33769432605";
const APP_URL = "https://phenoandcofidelite.netlify.app";
const normTel = t => t.replace(/[\s\-\.]/g, '');
const today = () => new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR');

let allClients = [];
let tapCount = 0, tapTimer = null;

window.tapAdmin = () => {
  tapCount++;
  clearTimeout(tapTimer);
  tapTimer = setTimeout(() => tapCount = 0, 1500);
  if (tapCount >= 2) {
    tapCount = 0;
    document.getElementById('pin-inp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('pin-err').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('pin-ov').classList.add('open');
  }
};

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
  const p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  if (p.get('admin') === '1') {
    window._preselect = p.get('client') || null;
    document.getElementById('pin-inp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('pin-err').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('pin-ov').classList.add('open');
  }
});

window.ferPin = () => document.getElementById('pin-ov').classList.remove('open');
window.valPin = () => {
  if (document.getElementById('pin-inp').value !== PIN) {
    document.getElementById('pin-err').style.display = 'block'; return;
  }
  ferPin();
  chargerAdmin();
};
document.getElementById('pin-inp').addEventListener('keyup', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') window.valPin(); });
window.rechargerAdmin = () => { window.location.href = window.location.pathname + '?admin=1'; };

window.go = id => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
};

const offreExpiree = dv => {
  if (!dv || dv.length < MAX) return false;
  const [j,m,a] = dv[MAX-1].split('/');
  return (new Date() - new Date(a,m-1,j)) / 86400000 > DELAI;
};
const joursRestants = dv => {
  if (!dv || dv.length < MAX) return 0;
  const [j,m,a] = dv[MAX-1].split('/');
  return Math.max(0, Math.ceil(DELAI - (new Date() - new Date(a,m-1,j)) / 86400000));
};

function renderTampons(cid, v, dv=[]) {
  const c = document.getElementById(cid); c.innerHTML = '';
  for (let i = 0; i <= MAX; i++) {
    const w = document.createElement('div'); w.className = 'tampon-wrap';
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'tampon' + (i < v ? ' filled' : '');
    d.textContent = i === MAX ? '🎁' : '✂️';
    w.appendChild(d);
    const dt = document.createElement('div');
    dt.className = 'tampon-date';
    dt.textContent = (i < v && dv[i]) ? dv[i] : '';
    w.appendChild(dt);
    c.appendChild(w);
  }
}

function afficherCarte(d, isNew) {
  document.getElementById('c-nom').textContent = d.prenom;
  document.getElementById('c-tel').textContent = '📞 ' + d.tel;
  document.getElementById('c-created').textContent = '📅 Client depuis le ' + d.dateCreation;
  const v = d.visites||0, dv = d.datesVisites||[];
  document.getElementById('c-progress').textContent = v + ' / ' + MAX;
  renderTampons('c-tampons', v, dv);
  const expire = offreExpiree(dv), offert = v >= MAX && !expire;
  document.getElementById('c-offert').style.display = offert ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('c-alerte').style.display = (v>=MAX && expire) ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (offert) document.getElementById('c-offert-txt').textContent = 'Vous avez ' + joursRestants(dv) + ' jour(s) pour en profiter. Venez vite ! ✂️';
  const btnWa = document.getElementById('btn-wa');
  if (isNew) {
    const msg = encodeURIComponent('Nouvelle demande de carte de fid\u00e9lit\u00e9 en attente de validation.%0A%0A%F0%9F%91%89 ' + APP_URL + '?admin=1&client=' + d.tel)
    btnWa.href = 'https://wa.me/' + GERANT_WA + '?text=' + msg;
    btnWa.style.display = 'flex';
  } else {
    btnWa.style.display = 'none';
  }
  setTimeout(() => {
    const qrDiv = document.getElementById('qr-canvas');
    qrDiv.innerHTML = '';
    try {
      new QRCode(qrDiv, {text: APP_URL + '?admin=1&client=' + d.tel, width:160, height:160, colorDark:'#070707', colorLight:'#ffffff', correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H});
      document.getElementById('qr-box').style.display = 'block';
    } catch(e) { console.log(e); }
  }, 400);
}

window.creerCarte = async () => {
  const prenom = document.getElementById('i-prenom').value.trim();
  const tel = normTel(document.getElementById('i-tel').value.trim());
  const email = document.getElementById('i-email').value.trim();
  const err = document.getElementById('err-ins');
  if (!prenom||!tel) { err.textContent='Remplis prénom et téléphone !'; err.style.display='block'; return; }
  err.style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('load-ins').style.display = 'block';
  try {
    const ref = doc(db,'clients',tel);
    const snap = await getDoc(ref);
    const isNew = !snap.exists();
    if (isNew) await setDoc(ref, {prenom,tel,email,visites:0,datesVisites:[],dateCreation:today()});
    afficherCarte((await getDoc(ref)).data(), isNew);
    go('s-carte');
  } catch(e) { err.textContent='Erreur de connexion.'; err.style.display='block'; }
  document.getElementById('load-ins').style.display = 'none';
};

window.rechercherCarte = async () => {
  const tel = normTel(document.getElementById('i-rech').value.trim());
  const err = document.getElementById('err-rech');
  if (!tel) { err.textContent='Entre ton numéro.'; err.style.display='block'; return; }
  err.style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('load-rech').style.display = 'block';
  try {
    const snap = await getDoc(doc(db,'clients',tel));
    if (!snap.exists()) { err.textContent='Aucune carte trouvée.'; err.style.display='block'; }
    else { afficherCarte(snap.data(), false); go('s-carte'); }
  } catch(e) { err.textContent='Erreur de connexion.'; err.style.display='block'; }
  document.getElementById('load-rech').style.display = 'none';
};

function renderClients(clients) {
  const liste = document.getElementById('liste-clients');
  liste.innerHTML = '';
  if (!clients.length) {
    liste.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:16px">Aucun résultat</p>';
    return;
  }
  const preselect = window._preselect;
  clients.forEach((c, idx) => {
    const v = c.visites||0, dv = c.datesVisites||[];
    const expire = offreExpiree(dv), offert = v >= MAX && !expire;
    let bc='badge', bt=v+'/'+MAX;
    if (offert) { bc='badge badge-ok'; bt='🎁'; }
    else if (v>=MAX && expire) { bc='badge badge-exp'; bt='⏰'; }
    const isHL = preselect && c.id === preselect;
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'client-row';
    if (isHL) row.style.border = '2px solid var(--gold-soft)';
    row.innerHTML = `
      <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
        <div class="nom"><span class="num">N°${idx+1}</span>${c.prenom}</div>
        <div class="sub">📞 ${c.tel}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-shrink:0">
        <span class="${bc}">${bt}</span>
        ${v < MAX ? `<button class="btn-inline" onclick="ajouterTampon('${c.id}',this)">+1 ✂️</button>`
          : (offert ? `<button class="btn-inline-green" onclick="utiliserOffre('${c.id}',this)">✅ Reset</button>` : '')}
        <button class="btn-inline-red" onclick="supprimerClient('${c.id}',this)">🗑️</button>
      </div>
    `;
    liste.appendChild(row);
    if (isHL) { row.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}); window._preselect = null; }
  });
}

window.filtrerClients = q => {
  const filtered = q.trim()
    ? allClients.filter(c => (c.prenom||'').toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()) || (c.tel||'').includes(q))
    : allClients;
  renderClients(filtered);
};

async function chargerAdmin() {
  go('s-admin');
  document.getElementById('load-liste').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('search-client').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('liste-clients').innerHTML = '';
  try {
    const snap = await getDocs(collection(db,'clients'));
    const clients = [];
    snap.forEach(d => clients.push({...d.data(), id:d.id}));
    clients.sort((a,b) => (a.prenom||'').localeCompare(b.prenom||'','fr'));
    allClients = clients;
    const total = clients.length;
    const offerts = clients.filter(c => c.visites>=MAX && !offreExpiree(c.datesVisites||[])).length;
    document.getElementById('stats-row').innerHTML = `
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">${total}</div><div class="stat-label">Clients</div></div>
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num" style="color:#4ade80">${offerts}</div><div class="stat-label">🎁 Offres</div></div>
    `;
    if (clients.length) document.getElementById('search-client').style.display = 'block';
    renderClients(clients);
  } catch(e) { console.error(e); }
  document.getElementById('load-liste').style.display = 'none';
}

window.ajouterTampon = async (id, btn) => {
  btn.textContent='...'; btn.disabled=true;
  try {
    const d = (await getDoc(doc(db,'clients',id))).data();
    await updateDoc(doc(db,'clients',id), {visites:(d.visites||0)+1, datesVisites:[...(d.datesVisites||[]),today()]});
    btn.textContent='✅';
    setTimeout(()=>chargerAdmin(), 800);
  } catch(e) { btn.textContent='+1 ✂️'; btn.disabled=false; }
};

window.utiliserOffre = async (id, btn) => {
  btn.textContent='...'; btn.disabled=true;
  try {
    await updateDoc(doc(db,'clients',id), {visites:0, datesVisites:[]});
    btn.textContent='✅';
    setTimeout(()=>chargerAdmin(), 800);
  } catch(e) { btn.textContent='Reset'; btn.disabled=false; }
};

window.supprimerClient = async (id) => {
  if (!confirm('Supprimer ce client ?')) return;
  try { await deleteDoc(doc(db,'clients',id)); chargerAdmin(); }
  catch(e) { console.error(e); }
};
</script>

</body>
</html>
